headline: PG&E Settlement Sheds Light On Legal Risks And Future Grid Investment
summary: PG&E (NYSE:PCG) has reached a proposed $100 million settlement in a longstanding securities class action lawsuit. The case covers individuals and entities that acquired PG&E securities between April 2015 and November 2018. A court hearing on the proposed settlement is scheduled for August 2026, with a claims process planned for affected shareholders. PG&E is one of the largest regulated utilities in the United States, supplying electricity and natural gas to millions of customers in...

headline: U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission Approves License Renewal Application for Extended Operations of Diablo Canyon
summary: The federal Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) today approved Pacific Gas and Electric Company's 20-year license renewal application for extended operations of Diablo Canyon Power Plant.
